title.zh: 迟来的 notiee 1.0.5 更新日志

summary.zh: 纯文字记录、自动翻出相关笔记、日程彩色标签——这一版做了几件一直想做的事。
summary.en: plain text notes, auto-surfaced related notes, color tags for events — a few things i'd wanted to do for a while.

summary.zh: 给我的小网站加了个博客角落——这是它的第一篇。
summary.en: i gave my little site a blog-ish corner. this is its first note.
